title: What I can do for you
description: From FLOW and FORM to Recovery—discover my three pillars for body and mind.

bottomCta.title: Ready to work together?
bottomCta.description: Let's reach your goals together. Contact me for a personalized offer.

0.heading: FLOW
0.description: Movement as a mental release valve. FLOW combines boxing and kickboxing for intense physical and mental relief—release stress, unlock energy, find focus.

1.heading: FORM
1.description: FORM is individual performance coaching for people who want to strengthen their body with purpose and become more resilient over the long term. Through functional training, athletic training, and personal support, you build strength, stability, and physical performance.

2.heading: Recovery
2.description: Regeneration for body and nervous system. IHHT training, ATP breathing, and regenerative methods for recovery, energy, and balance.
